title: 10 years of AlphaGo: The turning point for AI | Thore Graepel & Pushmeet Kohli
summary: A retrospective discussion marking 10 years since AlphaGo defeated Lee Sedol at Go in 2016. The video features Google DeepMind researchers Pushmeet Kohli and Thore Graepel reflecting on how this match catalyzed the modern AI revolution, from algorithmic advances to solving problems like protein folding.
